channel.title: ACIM Daily Minute
channel.description: Daily readings from A Course in Miracles. One-minute text passages and the 365 Workbook Lessons.

item.title: Daily Minute: "There is no order of difficulty in miracles..."
item.description: There is no order of difficulty in miracles. One is not "harder" or "bigger" than another. They are all the same. All expressions of love are maximal.

item.title: Lesson 98: I will accept my part in God's plan for salvation.
item.description: Today we will attempt to go past the ego's narrow, self-defeating vision, to its plan for "salvation." You are asked to accept your part in God's plan for salvation.
